---
title: "Mapping status Kanta lab"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
params: 
  summary: NULL
  devMode: FALSE
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---


```{r}
library(flexdashboard)
```

```{r}
summary<- params$summary
devMode <- params$devMode
```




### Mapping summary


```{r}
summaryOfMappingStatus(summary)
```

### Values summary
```{r}
summaryOfValues(summary)
```

### Full Table
** Link to the dashboard: [summaryTable.html](summaryTable.html) **
